holdings.infoBox: EEMS is an equity ETF with a total of 1743 individual holdings. The top holdings are Winbond Electronics stock at 1.10%, Nanya Technology at 0.91%, Phison Electronics at 0.78%, Taiwan Union Technology at 0.70%, and LG Innotek at 0.65%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Small Cap ETF (EEMS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets Small Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of emerging markets stocks with market capitalizations between $200M and $1.5B. EEMS was launched on Aug 16, 2011 and is issued by BlackRock.
